nasb.text: All his transgressions which he has committed will not be remembered against him; because of his righteousness which he has practiced, he will live.

esv.text: None of the transgressions that he has committed shall be remembered against him; for the righteousness that he has done he shall live.

cnv.text: 他所犯的一切罪過都不會被記念，作控訴他的理由；他必因自己所行的義而存活。

ccb.text: 我必不追究他以前所犯的一切罪行，他必因行事正直而活着。
